# Vasyl Bakhmut — Full-Stack Web Developer & AI Automation Specialist

> Melbourne-based full-stack web developer and AI automation
specialist helping Australian small businesses grow online.

## About

Vasyl Bakhmut is a full-stack web developer and AI automation
specialist based in Cheltenham, Melbourne VIC 3192, Australia.
With a background in construction project management and 3+ years
in software development, Vasyl builds custom websites, AI chatbots,
workflow automations, and SEO strategies for small businesses
across Melbourne, Sydney, and Australia-wide.

## Services

- [Web Design Melbourne](https://www.vasdev.au/services/web-design/melbourne)
- [Web Development](https://www.vasdev.au/services/web-development)
- [AI Chatbots & Automation Melbourne](https://www.vasdev.au/services/ai-automation/melbourne)
- [SEO Optimisation](https://www.vasdev.au/services/seo-optimization)
- [Ecommerce Solutions](https://www.vasdev.au/services/ecommerce-solutions)
- [Business Web Solutions](https://www.vasdev.au/services/business-web-solutions)

## Locations

- [Melbourne](https://www.vasdev.au/locations/melbourne)
- [Sydney](https://www.vasdev.au/locations/sydney)

- Web Design: from $199 AUD
- Business Website: from $299 AUD
